authors: Landauer, R.
title: Irreversibility and heat generation in the computing process
venue: IBM Journal of Research and Development
relevance_note: Foundational paper establishing k_B T ln 2 minimum per bit erasure; sets quasistatic limit that the Berut dataset's large-tau point verifies.

authors: Bennett, C. H.
title: The thermodynamics of computation — a review
relevance_note: Review cementing Landauer bound within Maxwell demon thermodynamics; provides the framework for interpreting finite-time excess heat.

authors: Landauer, R.
title: Minimal energy requirements in communication
relevance_note: Landauer's own later reassessment; relevant for discussing what the kT ln 2 floor does and does not apply to.

authors: Bérut, A.; Arakelyan, A.; Petrosyan, A.; Ciliberto, S.; Dillenschneider, R.; Lutz, E.
title: Experimental verification of Landauer's principle linking information and thermodynamics
relevance_note: The primary dataset of this project: ten (tau
column8: <Q_diss>) points from a colloidal double-well erasure experiment.

authors: Bérut, A.; Petrosyan, A.; Ciliberto, S.
title: Information and thermodynamics: experimental verification of Landauer's erasure principle
relevance_note: Expanded account of Berut 2012 including more detail on the photodiode reconstruction of the double-well potential.

authors: Proesmans, K.; Ehrich, J.; Bechhoefer, J.
title: Finite-time Landauer principle
relevance_note: Derives B = pi^2 coefficient in <Q_diss>(tau) = kT ln 2 + B kT/tau; the symmetric prediction this project tests against the full Berut curve.

authors: Proesmans, K.; Ehrich, J.; Bechhoefer, J.
title: Optimal finite-time bit erasure under full control
relevance_note: Long-form companion paper; contains detailed protocol analysis and discussion of Berut's experimental regime.

authors: Schmiedl, T.; Seifert, U.
title: Optimal finite-time processes in stochastic thermodynamics
relevance_note: Earliest derivation of 1/tau finite-time dissipation scaling for overdamped control; parent of Proesmans' formula.

authors: Reeb, D.; Wolf, M. M.
title: An improved Landauer principle with finite-size corrections
relevance_note: Equality form of Landauer principle with finite-reservoir corrections; demarcates which deviations the Berut refit can attribute to finite-time vs finite-reservoir physics.

authors: Sagawa, T.; Ueda, M.
title: Minimal energy cost for thermodynamic information processing: measurement and information erasure
relevance_note: Information-theoretic lower bounds on measurement + erasure; treats asymmetric memory explicitly.

authors: Sagawa, T.; Ueda, M.
title: Generalized Jarzynski equality under nonequilibrium feedback control
relevance_note: Feedback-informed Jarzynski equality; central to interpreting modern feedback-trap Landauer experiments as comparators.

authors: Jarzynski, C.
title: Nonequilibrium equality for free energy differences
relevance_note: Underlies the use of exponential averages in extracting free energy from Berut-type cycles.

authors: Crooks, G. E.
title: Entropy production fluctuation theorem and the nonequilibrium work relation for free energy differences
relevance_note: Detailed fluctuation theorem; underpins Berut's forward/backward work distribution analysis.

authors: Ito, S.; Dechant, A.
title: Stochastic time evolution information geometry and the Cramer-Rao bound
relevance_note: Information-geometric speed limits on observables; provides an alternative derivation of finite-time Landauer corrections via Fisher information.

authors: Van Vu, T.; Saito, K.
title: Speed limit for a highly irreversible process and tight finite-time Landauer's bound
relevance_note: Establishes tighter finite-time Landauer bound via geometric speed limits; provides comparator prediction to pi^2/tau.

authors: Van Vu, T.; Saito, K.
title: Finite-time quantum Landauer principle and quantum coherence
relevance_note: Quantum generalisation; includes classical limit that must reduce to Proesmans prediction.

authors: Zhen, Y.-Z.; Egloff, D.; Modi, K.; Dahlsten, O.

authors: Dago, S.; Pereda, J.; Ciliberto, S.; Bellon, L.

authors: Dago, S.; Ciliberto, S.; Bellon, L.
